title: C++ Foundations
description: Pointers, references, memory model, STL basics.

lessons.title: Hello, C++
lessons.subtitle: iostream basics

lessons.title: References
lessons.subtitle: Aliases, not copies
lessons.task: Double n via a reference parameter. Must print 42.
lessons.hint: x *= 2; — the caller's variable updates because x is a reference.

lessons.title: Pointers
lessons.subtitle: Addresses and dereferencing
lessons.task: Print the value of x through the pointer p.

lessons.title: std::vector
lessons.subtitle: Dynamic arrays
lessons.task: Print the sum of elements in v. Expected 15.
lessons.hint: int s = 0; for (int x : v) s += x; cout << s << endl;

lessons.title: std::string
lessons.subtitle: Manipulating text
lessons.task: Print the length of the string s. Expected 7.

lessons.title: Functions & headers
lessons.subtitle: Declaration vs definition
lessons.task: Define square(int n) so that square(9) prints 81.
lessons.hint: int square(int n) { return n * n; }
